name: operator-omics
description: Built-in bioinformatics and omics analysis operators for expression matrices, enrichment tables, and sequence utilities.

interface.shortDescription: PCA, differential expression, enrichment, and seqtk operators
interface.longDescription: Provides practical single-step operators for common omics work: base-R PCA on expression/count matrices, Welch-test differential expression, hypergeometric gene-set enrichment, and seqtk-backed FASTQ/FASTA subsampling. Operators read files from the active session workspace or selected remote environment and write artifacts under the operator run outdir.
defaultPrompt: Expose the PCA matrix operator and run it on my expression matrix.
Run differential expression using my count matrix and sample metadata.
Run functional enrichment for my gene list and GMT gene sets.
Use seqtk to subsample my FASTQ file.
